title: Great Structure
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Great Structure''' was the indoctrination system by which [[Nazzar/Legends|Nazzar]] rose in religious rank to become [[Prefect/Legends|praefects]], or priests, of the [[Ulizra]] religion.

It was originally instituted by [[Ikree]], a [[Prince/Legends|princess]] of [[Nazzri]], after she overthrew her father, [[Prrit Qabaq]], a follower of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]. 6 months into her reign, she was murdered, and her teachings were gradually corrupted into the basis of a [[Theocracy|theocratic]] dictatorship.

In c.[[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]] the Structure consisted of 14 [[Ven (Ulizra)|''vens'']], associated with distinct sects, one for each month of the Nazzri year. Students mastered each ''ven'' in turn, becoming ''praefects'' after the 14th ''ven''.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-11-XX -->''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''
*<!-- 2002-08-XX -->''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''
